reviews.review_description:
This game does have some good potential, but it's still glitchy and seems unfinished in certain parts.  I don't think it's compatible with the Meta Quest 2, because some of the grahics seem to be kind of stuttery at times.  (All the other rhythm games I play work just fine.)  

For instance the Hinode Camellia level, the visuals around 3 minutes start to lag behind and get all jumpy & pixellated (this is just one of many examples).  It reminds me of those old NES 8-bit Nintendo games like Castlevania or Mega Man, when there were too many characters on the screen at once, the graphics would noticably slow down.  Exact same thing here with BoomBox Remastered: the colored background (on the sides of the screen) kind of skips/skates along in chunks & doesn't flow smoothly, if there's too many visuals on-screen.

The worst oversight though is it's impossible to tell at-a-glance if you've played through a level already.  There's not like a "complete star" or green check-mark or something on the screen.  Every other similar rhythm game out there displays either how MANY times you've completed the level before, or at the very least a hash-mark, or symbol, or heart or something.  Just so that if I'm playing the game next week or 6 months from now, how can I tell which levels I've played already, and which ones I haven't? 

The only workaround this game offers, to display if you've already played through a level once before, is a clumsy one: attempting to use the Leaderboard which requires several clicks and several seconds of effort - as unintuitive as it is tedious.  It's almost as if these game developers made BoomBox in a vacuum, like they had never played any other  rhythm-based games before like Synth Riders, RagnaRock, AudioTrip, Song Beater, etc....all of which feature an EASY "one-glance" method to tell if you've completed a level already.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for taking the time to write detailed feedback.

BoomBox Remastered is a remastered version of the original BoomBox, which has been live since 2021 and consistently received positive reviews from players. The current version is marked as Early Access specifically because we are continuing to polish and refine details based on community input.

Regarding performance on Meta Quest 2, we have tested extensively with Quest 2 users across both the original and remastered versions, and have not observed consistent lag in normal gameplay. We also checked with our active Discord community again today, and Quest 2 players confirmed smooth performance. The only scenario where performance issues are commonly reported is during recording on the headset, which can impact frame rate.

BoomBox includes over 150 built-in maps. On Quest 2, the first time assets are loaded or downloaded, there can be a temporary performance impact, especially on older devices or when storage is limited. It would help to confirm that sufficient free space is available and that the headset cache has been cleared.

That said, the specific example you mentioned (Hinode Camellia around the 3-minute mark) is useful. If you are able to share more details, we would like to investigate it further.

On the progression visibility point, this is valid feedback. We agree that a clearer “played/completed” indicator should be available at a glance, and this is something we are already considering improving as part of ongoing updates.

BoomBox has been built closely with the rhythm game community, including experienced players from titles like Synth Riders, Ragnarock, and Audio Trip. Many current features are the result of that collaboration, and feedback like yours continues to shape the direction of the game.

If you are open to it, you are welcome to join our Discord and share more specifics. That would help us reproduce the issue and prioritize fixes.

reviews.review_description: This is a decent rhythm game where you hit moving pucks while your pet runs next to you. The targets are generally well timed with the music and can be positioned anywhere within the arc of both arms. That means you could be using your right hand to hit targets below, above, to the right and even to the left of you (same for your left hand obviously). That definitely keeps you on your toes as you’ll need to turn often within your play space. At the beginning, I was having to reach WAY up in the air to hit the targets above (I was seated) but then I realized I had to redo the “auto” height setting (ie. It wasn’t auto all the time, just the first time you click on it). I enjoyed the electronic music, especially the ones with a harder beat, though I can say the harder levels are definitely a challenge!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the thoughtful review! 💜 We’re glad you noticed the freedom of movement in the note positions, keeping players moving and engaged was a big goal for us. Good catch on the height setting as well, that tip will probably help other players too. And yes… the harder levels can definitely keep you on your toes! 😄 Thanks for playing and for taking the time to share your experience. 🥁

reviews.review_description: I mainly play Synth Riders (due to custom songs) but this game caught my eye. It's a same concept but done differently - you have a lovely pet running next to you. You can choose outfits too. Environments are lovely and very colorful too. Will definitely play more but need more practice for sure.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! 💜 We’re really happy BoomBox caught your eye. And yes, Pupa loves running alongside players 🐾🥁 Take your time with the practice,  it really clicks after a while. We hope you have lots of fun drumming (and dancing, and Achievement hunting)!

reviews.review_description: I have only tried this a couple of times but thoroughly enjoying it.  With my cute cat and the various options available, it is a great game.  Recently had a leg injury but I can see me building my fitness up again(as long as I don’t knock anything off the side) with all the options.  You won’t be disappointed, thank you 😁

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the kind words! 💜 We’re really happy you’re enjoying the game, and Pupa loves the company too 🐾🥁 Take it easy while recovering and go at your own pace. We hope BoomBox helps make getting back into movement fun. Wishing you a smooth recovery and lots of great drumming sessions! 😁

reviews.review_description: I am so thrilled to be playing Boombox again! Its satisfying hit feedback and adorable art style are as charming as ever. The UI and graphics look much more polished than before, and I’m really looking forward to the various updates planned for the Early Access period.

developer_response.body: We are so lucky to have you all with us - wouldn't be able to come back from ashes if not for you all. Thank you for all the support through the years!

reviews.review_description: Plenty of content to keep you going, beautiful art style and an adorable cat companion! I would definitely recommend this game to anyone looking for a fast-paced rhythm game with plenty of soul. Keep up the good work!
One of my new favourite games. Some levels are very difficult.

developer_response.body: So glad to hear that you are enjoying our game!!! And definitely, some levels - especially the Community Maps - are quite difficult, this is because the community loves to challenge themselves. Please, keep on practicing - there are just few moves, and once you learn them, you'll be climbing like a PRO!

reviews.review_description:
EDIT 2
Silly of me for missing the speed slider as I have found it now. The feature that is missing is that there is no way to group the tracks into a favorites group. Maybe in the future update, only time will tell. 

EDIT
I do miss the game speed slider though. 

I vaguely remember playing the original on a friend's headset and if memory serves, my friend also gifted me this game but because I was too busy with other games and other worldly stuff; I don't think I ever accepted or opened the gifted game. However, this remastered version is much better than I remember the original being.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for sharing this and for the thoughtful edits! 💜 We’re really happy to hear that BoomBox Remastered feels better than what you remember from the original. And no worries at all - we are adding all previous features to the game (just slowly as we are a very tiny team)

Great feedback on the favorites feature too. Grouping tracks is something we’ve heard from other players as well, and we’re keeping a close eye on ideas like this for future updates. Thanks for taking the time to explore the game and share your thoughts, it truly helps us make BoomBox better. 🥁

reviews.review_description: Rhytm game with its own and distinct personality and unique scoring system, not another clone of Beat saber and similar games. Beautiful home screen and good vibes. My impression is that lots of love and dedication has been put for creating the game. Especially if you are into rhytmic games, this is a must have. Significant improvents over previous version and better haptics, lots of songs for every taste. Just keep in mind that if you are beginning with rhytm games, there may be individual  learning curve involved  and time necessary to develop new skills, but gradually it will get better and you can really enjoy playing.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for this wonderful review 💜 It truly means the world to our small team. We poured a lot of love (and many late nights!) into BoomBox Remastered, so hearing that the game’s personality and vibes reached you makes us incredibly happy.
We’re especially glad you noticed the new scoring system and improvements - we’re constantly learning and building alongside the community. And you’re absolutely right about the learning curve: take your time, enjoy the music, and celebrate every little bit of progress. It really does click over time 🥁
Thank you for playing, supporting, and being part of our journey. We couldn’t do this without players like you.

reviews.review_description:
The developer got back to me and resolved my concern immediately . There was no way around this issue but to  re-release this as a new and updated title . I also suggest  going onto Discord and joining the community for further info and support. Thank you  and wrlcome back Boombox!! 

I may be in the wrong here but wasnt the last releaae stiil in early acceas phase? Im not sure how I feel about rebuying the same game based on  being updated or 'remastered' in this case.  Its basically the same game with a slightly more polished look and it has its own bugs to be polished out. I think it sets a bad precedent  imo. Dont get me wrong , developers need to make money for the work they do but i just think this is a bad way to do it and  those who had the previous version should not have to rebuy this . You cant argue that this isnt a great game though so my rating strictly reflects  the behind the scenes work of this title at this time .

developer_response.body:
Hey Cicorpio, we lost access to our previous release due to the administrative problems and had to re-release with the new ID in order to continue working on the game (you can read the full story on our Twitter). Please, join our discord - we are happy to share the keys with our community who previously owned the game.

Edit: Thank you for being understanding and accepting our apology. Very happy to have you back!

reviews.review_description:
BoomBox Remastered is hands-down one of the coolest VR rhythm games out there—the drumming feels so natural and immersive, turning every play session into an epic workout party with vibrant worlds pulsing to the beat.
I absolutely love jamming with Pupa the cat! 
Shoutout to the team for this remastered gem—keep listening to your players and dropping more bangers; you've got a fan for life!

developer_response.body:
This is such an awesome message to read, thank you so much 💗
We’re really happy the drumming feels natural and immersive for you. That “epic workout party” vibe in those vibrant worlds is what we dreamed of when working on Remastered, so it’s amazing to hear it lands that way on your side.
And Pupa is absolutely purring with pride right now 🐱 We love that you enjoy jamming with her.
Huge thanks as well for the kind words, we’ll keep listening, improving, and yes… dropping more bangers.
See you in-game, and thanks for being with us! 🎶

reviews.review_description: BoomBox: Remastered is pure fun with a clean, polished glow-up. The visuals feel sharper, performance stays smooth, and the audio hits with that satisfying punch that keeps you locked in. It’s easy to jump into, but addictive once you start chasing better runs and higher scores. If you want a fast, upbeat game you can pop into anytime for instant good vibes, this one earns a spot in your library.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for this, it honestly put a big smile on our faces 💗
We’re really happy the game gives you those “instant good vibes.” That’s what we hoped Remastered would feel like: something you can jump into anytime, have a great time, and forget about everything else for a while. Hearing that the visuals, performance, and audio all land well on your side means a lot to the team.
And yes, that “just one more run… okay maybe one more” feeling is very real 😄 (I was recording the video yesterday and couldn't stopped until my legs started hurting lol)
Thanks again for the kind words and for playing. We’re really glad Boombox has a spot in your library 🎶

reviews.review_description: I too like many people loved the original boombox and am so glad to see it come back as boombox remastered. This is a fun rhythm game that really makes you move. I personally think this game has better flow than many other rhythm games. Highly recommended for rhythm game fans.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for this lovely review 💗
It means a lot to hear from someone who loved the original and is happy to see Boombox return as Remastered. We’re really glad the game gets you moving and that the flow feels good to you - that was a big focus for us while rebuilding the experience.
Thanks as well for recommending it to other rhythm-game fans. Your support truly keeps us going.
Have fun, keep the beats rolling, and see you in-game! 🎶

reviews.review_description: The amazing rhythm game is BACK at it again with a remaster that is better than ever! This game includes smooth and clean graphics that feel really polished. Not only that, but they kept the same style and theme as they had in the original. Amazing game, and I wish everyone working on the game the best of luck in the future!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for this: what an incredibly kind message to read 💗
It feels incredible to be back, our community is so loving and supportive. Keeping the original style and spirit while polishing and improving everything was a big focus for us, so it means a lot to hear that it feels that way on your end.

The team will really appreciate your good-luck wishes too. We’ll keep working hard and making Boombox better, step by step, together with the community. Thanks again for the support and the warmth. Enjoy the music and see you in-game! 🎶

reviews.review_description:
BoomBox is back and better than ever! Grab your drum sticks and get ready to go though some of the most fun and thrilling rhythm based tracks out there!

Not only do ypu get some amazing ost's but the game has its own custom songs list fully integrated within the game! Search 100s of custom song for endless play!

Oh! And let's not forget about Pupa! You're absolutely loveable companion 😻

developer_response.body:
This is amazing, thank you! Your excitement is contagious 😄💗
We’re so happy you’re having fun with the tracks and the custom songs system. Being able to jump in and browse so many maps in-game was a big goal for us, so it’s awesome to hear it hits the mark.

And yes… Pupa is absolutely blushing right now and sending you big happy purring vibes 😻
Thanks again for the love and the energy. Have a great time playing, and we’re really glad to be “so back” together with you!

reviews.review_title: Drummers: THIS IS BEST VR RHYTHM GAME!!!
reviews.review_description:
As a Metal Drummer for over 30 years, and having played every VR rhythm and drumming game since the Oculus Rift DK1 was released I can tell you that BoomBox has the most realistic and lag-free hit boxes of ANY game. The amount of content is mind blowing as well. Literally the best of both worlds. 

I think it comes down to the perfect combination of the shape of the mallets and the drum heads. It just feels so….natural. 

Try it NOOOOWWW!!!

developer_response.body: Killer, you're amazing, thank you so much for your support! We just partnered with an indie music studio that has a large catalogue of Metal/Rock masterpieces - will make sure to add them to our Custom Maps collection <3

reviews.review_description: This is insanely fun from the very first beat. This game absolutely nails the rhythm beat genre with vibrant visuals, tight controls, and music that makes you want to move. Whether you’re a rhythm game veteran or new to it, it’s easy to jump in and have a great time.  Fun, energetic, and incredibly satisfying to master. This is a must-play for anyone with a love for music-driven action and rhythm based fitness and there are several rhythm based VR games but not at this great price point, well done devs.  Five stars all the way!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for this amazing review, it genuinely means a lot to us 💗
We’re so happy to hear it was fun from the very first beat. Whether someone is brand new or a rhythm-game veteran, we love knowing it feels easy to jump in and satisfying to improve.
Your kind words about the value, the fitness aspect, and the “five stars all the way” will absolutely make the team’s day 😊
Thanks again for playing and for taking the time to share this. Have an awesome time in Boombox! 🎶

reviews.review_description:
It's so good to be back,especially when it comes to BoomBox. I got this game as a gift for a special occasion back to 2023-2024 and it turned into something better than i had *sobbing*.
I'm so happy to be a part of this incredible game as user,player,whatever  and u guys ,definitely should be here ❤️.

developer_response.body: Thank you so so much!!! 💗 It feels amazing to be back - and you all have been an incredible community. Thank you for all the love!

reviews.review_title: A nice edition to the rhythm genre
reviews.review_description:
There are lots of rhythm games on quest, this has to be up there with the top ones, very intuitive and hits the spot for music and movement, the drum style is pretty accurate and a lot of fun, my coordination is not the best, but I’m hitting all the right notes, the colours are vibrant and makes for an attractive looking game.
A great way to get fit in 2026.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for this lovely review 💗
We’re really happy to hear Boombox is hitting that sweet spot of music and movement for you. The drum-style gameplay was a big focus for us, so it’s awesome to know it feels intuitive and fun. And hey - coordination or not, if you’re hitting the notes, you’re doing amazing 😄

We’re also glad you’re enjoying the vibrant colors and overall look of the game. Hearing that it can be part of your “getting fit in 2026” plans genuinely makes us smile (*rushing back to make more fitness maps*).

Thanks again for playing and for the kind words. Have fun, keep moving, and see you in-game! 🎶

reviews.review_description: So glad to see boombox return, the game retains the same charm as the original.  I had the original game and loved it, and with the new backend it seems to look and run better, it is a great rhythm game that makes an excelent workout.  The game is releasing in early access but dont let that scare you off the devs are passionate about this game and have a few things to check off their todo list before final release.  This is a great, fun game at a very fair price.

developer_response.body: Yesss!!! Pupa is back and is ready to exercise with you <3 So lucky to have you with us! Thank you for all the support and love!

reviews.review_description: New game remake and the og lobby is back 🥳 been playing this game since the start and fell in love with it on first play through. Can't wait to play multi-player with everyone again

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much - this really means a lot to us 💗
Hearing this from someone who’s been with the game since the very beginning is extra special. We’re so glad you’re enjoying the remake and that the OG lobby being back hit the right nostalgic note.
And yes… we can’t wait for everyone to jump into multiplayer together again either. It’s going to be so much fun when the whole crew is back in one place. 
Thanks for sticking with us through everything and for all the love. See you in-game!

reviews.review_description:
Loving the remastered version, much better and smoother than the original.
Great graphics and music

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! 💜 We’re really happy to hear you’re enjoying the smoother feel and the upgraded visuals and music. It means a lot to us that you noticed the improvements. Thanks for playing and for the support! 🥁

reviews.review_description:
Jump in the environment that you like. There are a lot of different ones.

Just beat the drums and dodge for obstacles .

I like the tails of the drumsticks.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! We are very happy you're enjoying the game - we have so much planned for this year! Lucky to have you with us!

reviews.review_description: I loved it

developer_response.body: Fantastic to hear!!!

reviews.review_description: This game was good before but it’s made better now and is pretty fun.

developer_response.body: Thank you Nova, really glad you're enjoying our Remastered version. So many new features are currently in development. You all are such a great community <3

reviews.review_description: Nice to play upgraded Cute Rhythm Game.

developer_response.body: Thank you Carpedian, really happy you enjoy our game <3 We have so many plans for the future - it is just the beginning!

reviews.review_description: I enjoyed playing this a lot more than I should have,  The music is catchy, the visuals are bright, and the gameplay makes you want to move. You don’t need to be a rhythm game pro to enjoy it—it feels natural pretty quickly. While more songs and modes would be nice, what’s already there is enough to keep things fun.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the kind words! 💜 We’re really happy to hear that the music, visuals, and movement clicked for you and that it felt natural to jump into. More songs and modes are definitely something we’re excited to keep working on together with the community. Thanks for playing and for being part of the rhythm! 🥁

reviews.review_description:
Yup. A lot of people are gonna compare this game to others, but honestly this is the best alternative rhythm game i’ve ever tried! ￼There is no swinging motion, it’s a hitting motion, so the workout is WAY better, and with the fitness mode coming soon, i’m more excited than ever to burn some calories. The upbeat music mixed with the playstyle keeps the game very entertaining almost like you are dance punching but it’s drumming! 

Aside from the gameplay, what else stands out to me is the ability to create custom levels and browse community made ones without having to download any mods. While I haven’t had a chance to try them yet I know that my expectations will be met because everything else in this game has already exceeded them! Good job to everyone involved :)

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for this amazing review 💜 You absolutely made our day! We’re so glad you’re enjoying the drumming style and the workout side of BoomBox - that “hit the beat” feeling is exactly what we wanted. We already have a lot of fitness custom maps, and group them under the fitness category, we’re super excited about it too 😊
We’re also really happy you appreciate the in-game custom songs and community levels. Our players are incredibly creative, and we can’t wait for you to try them out.
Thanks again for the kind words and encouragement, it means the world to our small team. Have an awesome time drumming and burning those calories! 🥁

reviews.review_description: The best cat game that includes a rhythm game! There was a dispute with the publisher (they took the money and ran!) and the team worked hard to bring it back new and improved! Digging the tracks by artists I've never heard before and the drumming feels better than ever - it's like a cross between beat saber and smash drums, but with a cat!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for this, we’re really happy to see you enjoying Remastered again 💗 It means a lot that you stuck with us through everything and came back to play the new version. We’re especially glad you’re loving the tracks from new artists and that the drumming feels better than ever on your side. 
Also yes… Boombox with a cat is absolutely a valid genre now 😄🐱

reviews.review_description:
If you like rhythmic music games - it is a must have - just give a try and you will love it for sure!
There's a chance you've heard of this game before - there were some vicissitudes, but the devs are the same in this app and  this version and it's better than it was.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! 💜 We’re really happy you’re enjoying this version. Yes - it’s still the same devs, just with a fresh start and lots of new love, polish, and community help behind it. Thanks for giving BoomBox another try and for the kind words!

reviews.review_description: Boombox is a masterpiece of rhythm the tutorial seemed a bit dull to me but when you play a song it feels incredible It has some things that could be improved, and like any rhythm game the community makes its own songs which are perfectly integrated.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for sharing this, and for calling Boombox a masterpiece of rhythm, that really means a lot to us 💗
Totally fair note about the tutorial. Feedback like this is super helpful, and we’re already thinking about ways to make the “first steps” feel more exciting and smoother. We’re really glad that once you jumped into the songs, it clicked and felt incredible for you.
The community music side is something we love too, so it’s awesome to hear you’re enjoying the integrated custom songs.
Thanks again for the honesty, the kindness, and for playing. We’ll keep improving it together with you 🎶

reviews.review_description: Easy to pick up and start getting some activity while having fun! Loved jaming to the different songs and learning all the rhythms. Such a fabulous game, excited to share with my girlfriends

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for this, we absolutely love hearing that 💗
We’re really happy Boombox has become a fun little home workout for you. That’s what we aimed for: something easy to jump into, get moving, and enjoy the music while learning the rhythms.
So glad you’re enjoying the songs and jamming along, and it means a lot that you want to share it with your girlfriends too, that’s the best compliment 😊
Thanks again for the kind words. Have fun, keep moving, and see you in-game! 🎶

reviews.review_title: Starting over is like being reborn.
reviews.review_description: Keep making progress and publish more wonderful content

developer_response.body: We will try our best! Thank you for all your support and love, we are lucky to have such a fantastic community 💗

reviews.review_description: Feels great to play.. one of the best rhythm games in vr

developer_response.body: Thank you for saying this! We really appreciate your support and glad to hear that you enjoy our game 💗
